articles.summary: Centcom claims attacks on Iranian command centres, air defence facilities, coastal surveillance  The US Central Command said it completed its ninth consecutive night of strikes against Iran, claiming attacks on Iranian military coastal surveillance and air defence facilities. "CENTCOM assets targeted Iranian military command centers, air defense and coastal surveillance sites, maritime capabilities, missile and drone launch sites, and communications networks," it said in a post on X.

articles.title: IRGC says US aircrafts targeted at Jordan’s Aqaba airport
articles.summary: IRGC says US aircrafts targeted at Jordan’s Aqaba airport Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) claimed attacks targeting US C-17 transport planes and a P-8 aircraft at Aqaba airport in Jordan. According to the statement, the US aircrafts "were targeted with ballistic missiles, causing severe damage to a number of them". The IRGC also said that it targeted 20 shelters where US forces were stationed in the in the Muwaffaq Salti Air Base, "killing of dozens of American terrorist forces".

"It's clear that Iran, at least some people in Iran, want to control the straits and hold that as leverage against the world," Rubio told reporters. articles.title: Trump says US hitting Iran 'very hard' to honour soldiers killed
articles.summary: Trump says US hitting Iran 'very hard' to honour soldiers killed US President Donald Trump said that the latest attacks on Iran were carried out in "honour" of US service members recently killed. "We hit them very hard again tonight, and we did that in honour of the, probably three, it's probably three great patriots," he told reporters.  When asked about the military fatalities, Trump responded that "we feel very badly," adding that those who died were fighting so that Tehran "cannot have a nuclear weapon".

articles.title: Reports of blasts across Iran
articles.summary: Reports of blasts across Iran Shortly after Centcom announced launching attacks against Iran for the ninth night in a row, several explosions were reported across the country.  Blasts were reported in Iran's southern cities of Bandar Mahshahr, Bandar Imam Khomeini and Chabahar as well as the north western city of Tabriz.  According to Iran's semi-official Mehr news agency,  the country's air defence systems were activated in Konarak.
